items.name: Monkey Shoulder Blended Malt Scotch Whisky
items.description: Blended malt Scotch whisky. Smooth enough to drink neat, commonly used in cocktails.
items.notes: Price approximate (~$55–65) — check Dan Murphy's for current price. Any Perth Dan Murphy's or BWS will stock it. 700ml standard; 1L also available.

items.name: Moment 1.33x Anamorphic Lens + Pixel 9 Pro Case
items.description: Nathan's taking a big trip and wants proper cinematic video on his phone. This is the lens that does it — widescreen 2.4:1 ratio with those horizontal lens flares you see in films. Heads up: this is two separate purchases. The lens is ~$250 and requires a specific Moment case for the Pixel 9 Pro (~$70) to mount properly — total around $320.

retailers.name: Moment ANZ — Pixel 9 Pro Case, required (~$70)

items.lead_time: Ships from Moment ANZ — typically 3–7 days to Perth
items.notes: Gold or blue flare options — either is fine. Sirui is a quality alternative worth comparing. Both items ship from Moment's Australian store.

items.name: Magnetic Levitating Globe with LED Light
items.description: Cool desk toy for Nathan's apartment — a globe that floats and spins above its base using magnets and lights up. Just something fun to have.
items.lead_time: In stock online; Big W Perth stores likely stock these
items.notes: Prices vary by size ($50–150). Go for a larger model (20cm+ globe) — the tiny 8cm ones are underwhelming. Check Big W first for easy in-person purchase.
